## What & why

Briefly: what does this change and why?

## Touches the wire contract?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated in **both** EN and FR (README / ROADMAP) where user-facing
- [ ] Changeset added (`npm run changeset`) if a published package changed
- [ ] `npm run build`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` all pass locally
